Affiliate Disclaimer

Last updated: 2026

What This Means

Some of the links on Solopreneur Tools are affiliate links. This means that if you click on a link and make a purchase, I may receive a small commission at no extra cost to you.

Why I Use Affiliate Links

Running a website takes time, effort, and money. Affiliate commissions help cover:

  • Website hosting and domain costs
  • Research time for testing and reviewing tools
  • Content creation and maintenance
  • Email and marketing tools

My Promise to You

I only recommend products and services that:

  • I have personally used or thoroughly researched
  • I believe will provide genuine value to solopreneurs
  • I would recommend even without an affiliate relationship

My reviews are based on honest assessments of each tool's features, pricing, and value. An affiliate relationship never influences my opinion or rating of a product.

Types of Affiliate Relationships

This site participates in affiliate programs including but not limited to:

  • Amazon Associates
  • Individual company affiliate programs
  • Third-party affiliate networks

Transparency

When a post contains affiliate links, I will clearly indicate this within the content or at the end of the article. This allows you to make informed decisions about your purchases.

Questions?

If you have any questions about my affiliate relationships or the products I recommend, please contact me.

Your Support Matters

When you use my affiliate links, you're supporting independent content creation and helping me continue to provide free, valuable resources for solopreneurs. Thank you for your support!
